testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should log messages at or above configured level
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should log messages at or above configured level

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should not log when level is silent
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should not log when level is silent

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should log errors with stack trace
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should log errors with stack trace

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration start
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration start

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration end with success
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration end with success

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration end with failure
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration end with failure

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration errors
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should track migration errors

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should display batch progress
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should display batch progress

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should not display progress when progress is disabled
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should not display progress when progress is disabled

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should track lock events
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should track lock events

testcase.classname: Logger ConsoleLogger should track hook events
testcase.name: Logger ConsoleLogger should track hook events

testcase.classname: Logger createLogger should create ConsoleLogger for non-silent levels
testcase.name: Logger createLogger should create ConsoleLogger for non-silent levels

testcase.classname: Logger createLogger should create SilentLogger for silent level
testcase.name: Logger createLogger should create SilentLogger for silent level

testcase.classname: Logger createSilentLogger should not output anything
testcase.name: Logger createSilentLogger should not output anything

testcase.name: Batch Processing batchProcess should process all items in batches

testcase.name: Batch Processing batchProcess should collect errors without stopping

testcase.name: Batch Processing batchProcess should handle empty result

testcase.classname: Batch Processing batchProcess should use cursor for pagination
testcase.name: Batch Processing batchProcess should use cursor for pagination

testcase.classname: Batch Processing batchProcess should apply delay between batches
testcase.name: Batch Processing batchProcess should apply delay between batches

testcase.classname: Batch Processing batchProcessWithRetry should succeed on first attempt
testcase.name: Batch Processing batchProcessWithRetry should succeed on first attempt

testcase.classname: Batch Processing batchProcessWithRetry should retry on failure
testcase.name: Batch Processing batchProcessWithRetry should retry on failure

testcase.classname: Batch Processing estimateBatchSize should calculate batch size based on row size
testcase.name: Batch Processing estimateBatchSize should calculate batch size based on row size

testcase.classname: Batch Processing estimateBatchSize should clamp to minimum of 100
testcase.name: Batch Processing estimateBatchSize should clamp to minimum of 100

testcase.classname: Batch Processing estimateBatchSize should clamp to maximum of 10000
testcase.name: Batch Processing estimateBatchSize should clamp to maximum of 10000

testcase.name: Batch Processing createProgressTracker should track progress increments

testcase.name: Batch Processing createProgressTracker should set absolute value

testcase.name: Batch Processing createProgressTracker should call done

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should acquire lock using advisory lock
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should acquire lock using advisory lock

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should release lock using advisory unlock
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should release lock using advisory unlock

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should fall back to table-based lock when advisory locks not supported
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should fall back to table-based lock when advisory locks not supported

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should retry lock acquisition on failure
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should retry lock acquisition on failure

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should return false if lock cannot be acquired after retries
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should return false if lock cannot be acquired after retries

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should track if lock is held
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should track if lock is held

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should extend lock timeout
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should extend lock timeout

testcase.classname: Lock DatabaseLock should return true if already held when acquiring
testcase.name: Lock DatabaseLock should return true if already held when acquiring

testcase.classname: Lock NoopLock should always acquire successfully
testcase.name: Lock NoopLock should always acquire successfully

testcase.classname: Lock NoopLock should always report as held
testcase.name: Lock NoopLock should always report as held

testcase.classname: Lock NoopLock should release without error
testcase.name: Lock NoopLock should release without error

testcase.classname: Lock NoopLock should extend without error
testcase.name: Lock NoopLock should extend without error

testcase.classname: Lock createLock should create DatabaseLock when enabled
testcase.name: Lock createLock should create DatabaseLock when enabled

testcase.classname: Lock createLock should create NoopLock when disabled
testcase.name: Lock createLock should create NoopLock when disabled

testcase.name: Export formatDuration should format minutes and seconds

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner ensureMigrationsTable should create table if it does not exist
testcase.name: MigrationRunner ensureMigrationsTable should create table if it does not exist

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner ensureMigrationsTable should not create table if it already exists

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return executed migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return executed migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return empty array if no migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return empty array if no migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner getStatus should return correct status with pending and executed migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner getStatus should return correct status with pending and executed migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner runMigrations should execute pending migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner runMigrations should execute pending migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner runMigrations should stop on first failure
testcase.name: MigrationRunner runMigrations should stop on first failure

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner runMigrations should return success if no pending migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner runMigrations should return success if no pending migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should rollback the last executed migration
testcase.name: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should rollback the last executed migration

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if no migrations to rollback
testcase.name: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if no migrations to rollback

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if migration has no down function
testcase.name: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if migration has no down function

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner reset should clear all migration records
testcase.name: MigrationRunner reset should clear all migration records

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should create migration table and run migrations
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should create migration table and run migrations

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should run multiple migrations in sequence
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should run multiple migrations in sequence

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should skip already executed migrations
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should skip already executed migrations

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should stop on first failure and not execute subsequent migrations
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should stop on first failure and not execute subsequent migrations

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should support rollback with down function
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should support rollback with down function

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should return false when rolling back migration without down function
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should return false when rolling back migration without down function

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should reset all migration records
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should reset all migration records

testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationContext should provide prisma client and log function to migrations

testcase.name: Generator should export generator handler

testcase.name: CLI init command should create migrations directory

testcase.name: CLI create command should generate migration file with correct naming

testcase.classname: CLI status command should display migration status correctly
testcase.name: CLI status command should display migration status correctly

testcase.classname: CLI run command should execute pending migrations
testcase.name: CLI run command should execute pending migrations

testcase.name: CLI run command should handle migration failures

testcase.name: CLI rollback command should return false if no migrations to rollback

testcase.name: HookManager constructor should initialize with empty hooks

testcase.classname: HookManager constructor should initialize with all hooks
testcase.name: HookManager constructor should initialize with all hooks

testcase.classname: HookManager runBeforeAll should do nothing if no hook configured
testcase.name: HookManager runBeforeAll should do nothing if no hook configured

testcase.classname: HookManager runBeforeAll should skip hook if script not found
testcase.name: HookManager runBeforeAll should skip hook if script not found

testcase.classname: HookManager runBeforeEach should do nothing if no hook configured
testcase.name: HookManager runBeforeEach should do nothing if no hook configured

testcase.classname: HookManager runAfterEach should do nothing if no hook configured
testcase.name: HookManager runAfterEach should do nothing if no hook configured

testcase.classname: HookManager runAfterAll should do nothing if no hook configured
